creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Sat, Jul 08, 2000 at 11:23:52AM +0800, Michael Robinson wrote:
> It doesn't work for me, and everything is fresh from CVS this week.  Check if
> your versions are the same.

(23:28:16) [will@radon /usr/ports/x11/XFree86]% ident Makefile \
cd /usr/ports/Mk;ident *.mk
Makefile: $FreeBSD: ports/x11/XFree86/Makefile,v 1.80 2000/06/16 21:52:08 asami Exp $
bsd.emacs.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.emacs.mk,v 1.4 2000/06/27 00:05:23 jseger Exp $
bsd.port.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk,v 1.340 2000/06/16 21:52:40 asami Exp $ $NetBSD: $
bsd.port.post.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.port.post.mk,v 1.3 1999/08/25 04:40:21 obrien Exp $ 
bsd.port.pre.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.port.pre.mk,v 1.3 1999/08/25 04:40:21 obrien Exp $ 
bsd.port.subdir.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.port.subdir.mk,v 1.37 2000/06/14 01:58:13 asami Exp $
bsd.sites.mk: $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.sites.mk,v 1.4 2000/06/22 05:31:13 will Exp $

All sup'd from my local cvsup server, mirrored from cvsup7.freebsd.org
today a few hours ago.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrewsw@purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
